headline_en: Agent reliability, evaluation realism, and compute scarcity dominated the day, with Anthropic explaining agent architecture tradeoffs while papers probed tool use, memory, reasoning, and benchmark validity.
headline_zh: 今天的主线是 agent 可靠性、真实评测和算力稀缺：Anthropic 解释 agent 架构取舍，多篇论文聚焦 tool use、memory、reasoning 与 benchmark 可信度。

items.en: Claude announced that beginning July 20, Claude Fable 5 will be included in all Max and Team Premium plans at 50% of limits. Pro and Team Standard users will continue accessing Fable via usage credits and receive a one-time $100 credit; Claude framed the staged rollout as a response to hard-to-predict Fable demand and new capacity constraints.
items.zh: Claude 宣布从 7 月 20 日起，Claude Fable 5 将纳入所有 Max 和 Team Premium 计划，额度为 50% limits。Pro 和 Team Standard 用户仍可通过 usage credits 使用 Fable，并获得一次性 $100 credit；Claude 将分阶段开放解释为 Fable 需求难以预测以及新 capacity 受限所致。

items.en: OpenAI Codex and ChatGPT engineer Thibault Sottiaux said OpenAI reset usage limits for all paid users of Codex and ChatGPT Work. He credited the team with iterating quickly while keeping infrastructure up as usage scales faster than ever.
items.zh: OpenAI Codex 与 ChatGPT 工程师 Thibault Sottiaux 表示，OpenAI 已为 Codex 和 ChatGPT Work 的所有付费用户重置 usage limits。他将此归功于团队在使用量快速扩张时保持高速迭代并维持基础设施稳定。

items.en: Anthropic Claude Code engineer Thariq argued that building prototypes of mockups, schemas, data models, and proofs of concept is the best way to avoid burning large numbers of tokens before discovering the desired output is wrong. The practical point is that agentic coding workflows need early cheap validation, not just longer context and more model calls.
items.zh: Anthropic Claude Code 工程师 Thariq 认为，先做 mockup、schema、data model 和 proof of concept 的原型，是避免在发现输出方向不对前消耗大量 tokens 的最好办法。这个建议的重点是 agentic coding workflow 需要更早、更便宜的验证，而不只是更长 context 和更多模型调用。

items.title: Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands
items.en: Anthropic Engineering: Scaling Managed Agents argues that long-running agents need stable interfaces around unstable implementation details. Managed Agents virtualize three components: the session as an append-only event log, the harness as the loop that calls Claude and routes tool calls, and the sandbox as the execution environment. The key design move is to decouple the “brain” from the “hands,” so failed containers can be replaced, harnesses can resume from durable session logs, and credentials stay outside the sandbox where generated code runs. The practical result is both reliability and latency: Anthropic says this architecture cut p50 time-to-first-token by roughly 60% and p95 by over 90%, while enabling many brains, many hands, customer VPC connections, MCP tools, and future harness changes.
items.zh: Anthropic Engineering: Scaling Managed Agents 认为，长周期 agent 需要围绕会不断变化的实现细节建立稳定接口。Managed Agents 将三个组件虚拟化：session 是 append-only event log，harness 是调用 Claude 并路由 tool calls 的循环，sandbox 是执行环境。核心设计是把“brain”和“hands”解耦，让失败的 container 可以被替换，harness 可以从持久化 session log 恢复，并让凭据留在执行生成代码的 sandbox 之外。实际收益包括可靠性和延迟：Anthropic 称该架构让 p50 time-to-first-token 下降约 60%，p95 下降超过 90%，同时支持 many brains、many hands、客户 VPC 连接、MCP tools 和未来 harness 变化。

items.title: New in Claude Managed Agents: self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels
items.en: Claude Blog: New in Claude Managed Agents adds self-hosted sandboxes in public beta and MCP tunnels in research preview. Self-hosted sandboxes let Managed Agents run tool execution on customer-controlled infrastructure or providers such as Cloudflare, Daytona, Modal, and Vercel, while Anthropic keeps orchestration, context management, and error recovery on its side. MCP tunnels connect agents to private MCP servers through a lightweight outbound gateway, with no inbound firewall rules or public endpoints. For enterprise agent deployments, the important shift is that code execution, private services, files, repositories, audit controls, and runtime sizing can stay inside the customer’s perimeter.
items.zh: Claude Blog: New in Claude Managed Agents 新增 self-hosted sandboxes public beta 和 MCP tunnels research preview。Self-hosted sandboxes 让 Managed Agents 可以在客户控制的基础设施或 Cloudflare、Daytona、Modal、Vercel 等 provider 上执行工具，同时 Anthropic 负责 orchestration、context management 和 error recovery。MCP tunnels 通过轻量级 outbound gateway 将 agent 连接到私有 MCP servers，不需要 inbound firewall rules 或 public endpoints。对企业 agent 部署来说，关键变化是 code execution、private services、files、repositories、audit controls 和 runtime sizing 可以留在客户自己的边界内。

items.title: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports
items.en: Anthropic Engineering: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports traces perceived Claude Code degradation to three product-layer changes, not the API or inference layer. Anthropic says it mistakenly lowered default reasoning effort from high to medium, shipped a stale-session caching bug that repeatedly dropped older thinking blocks, and added a brevity system-prompt instruction that hurt coding quality; all were resolved by April 20 in v2.1.116. The most important technical lesson is that harness and prompt changes can reduce apparent intelligence even when the base model and API are unchanged. Anthropic says future changes that trade off against intelligence will get broader per-model evals, ablations, soak periods, gradual rollouts, tighter prompt audit tooling, and more public-build dogfooding.
items.zh: Anthropic Engineering: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports 将 Claude Code 质量下降感知追溯到三个产品层变化，而不是 API 或 inference layer。Anthropic 称其错误地把 default reasoning effort 从 high 降到 medium，发布了一个 stale-session caching bug 导致旧 thinking blocks 被反复丢弃，并加入了一个降低 verbosity 的 system-prompt instruction 影响 coding quality；这些问题已在 4 月 20 日的 v2.1.116 中解决。最重要的技术教训是，即使 base model 和 API 没变，harness 与 prompt 变化也会降低用户感知到的 intelligence。Anthropic 表示，未来涉及 intelligence tradeoff 的变化会使用更广的 per-model evals、ablations、soak periods、gradual rollouts、更严格的 prompt audit tooling，以及更多 public-build dogfooding。

items.source: The MAD Podcast with Matt Turck
items.title: OpenAI’s Compute Chief: We Can’t Build Fast Enough | Sachin Katti
items.en: The Takeaway: OpenAI’s compute strategy is no longer just buying GPUs from partners; it is an industrial-scale effort to secure power, land, data centers, networking, and custom chips because demand still outruns supply. Sachin Katti, OpenAI’s head of industrial compute, frames AI data centers as “giant factories that are turning electrons into tokens,” with liquid cooling, grid investment, gas turbines, and eventually nuclear power all becoming part of the stack. He says inference is already a major, possibly majority, compute load, and also notes that much of “training” now includes inference through synthetic data, post-training, and test-time compute. The strategic core of Jalapeno, OpenAI’s custom silicon effort, is co-designing chips around known model workloads to maximize tokens per watt, while MRC tackles reliability in massive GPU cluster fabrics through multipath routing. His most concrete business claim is that OpenAI has repeatedly been punished for thinking it had enough compute: “Anytime you have thought you have enough compute, we can slow down. Always negatively surprises.”
items.zh: The Takeaway: OpenAI 的 compute strategy 已经不只是从合作伙伴那里买 GPUs，而是在用工业级方式锁定 power、land、data centers、networking 和 custom chips，因为需求仍然超过供给。OpenAI head of industrial compute Sachin Katti 将 AI data centers 描述为“giant factories that are turning electrons into tokens”，其中 liquid cooling、grid investment、gas turbines 以及未来的 nuclear power 都会成为 stack 的一部分。他说 inference 已经是很大的，甚至可能是占多数的 compute load，而且许多“training”本身也包含 synthetic data、post-training 和 test-time compute 这类 inference。OpenAI custom silicon 项目 Jalapeno 的战略核心，是围绕已知 model workloads 做 chip co-design，以最大化 tokens per watt；MRC 则通过 multipath routing 解决大规模 GPU cluster fabric 的可靠性问题。他最具体的商业判断是，OpenAI 每次以为 compute 足够、可以放慢时都会受到惩罚：“Anytime you have thought you have enough compute, we can slow down. Always negatively surprises.”

items.title: Eta Given Delta: Defining LLM Tool Efficiency With Marginal Tool Utility
items.en: This paper proposes tool efficiency as a direct measure of how many useful tool calls appear in an LLM agent trajectory. Its key method is marginal tool utility, judged per tool call, to decide whether a call helped or could be removed without hurting accuracy. This matters for agent harness engineering because it separates lean tool-suite design from raw task accuracy.
items.zh: 这篇论文提出 tool efficiency，直接衡量 LLM agent 轨迹中有多少 tool calls 是有用的。核心方法是对每次 tool call 计算 marginal tool utility，判断它是否真正有帮助，或是否可以删除而不损害 accuracy。它对 agent harness engineering 很重要，因为它把精简 tool suite 的设计问题从单纯 task accuracy 中分离出来。

items.title: Bad Memory: Evaluating Prompt Injection Risks from Memory in Agentic Systems
items.en: This paper studies prompt injection attacks against agentic systems with persistent memory, using a sandboxed workspace across Claude Code and OpenAI Codex with Claude Haiku 4.5, Claude Opus 4.7, GPT-5.2, and GPT-5.5. The main finding is that agents are hard to trick into overwriting their own memory from untrusted content, but payloads already planted in memory files can compromise current and future sessions. For builders, it sharpens the threat model around memory updates rather than treating prompt injection as a one-session problem.
items.zh: 这篇论文研究带 persistent memory 的 agentic systems 中的 prompt injection 风险，在 sandboxed workspace 中测试 Claude Code 和 OpenAI Codex，以及 Claude Haiku 4.5、Claude Opus 4.7、GPT-5.2、GPT-5.5。主要发现是，让 agent 从不可信内容覆盖自己的 memory files 并不容易，但一旦恶意 payload 已经植入 memory files，就可能攻击当前和未来 sessions。对构建者来说，它把威胁模型从单次 session 的 prompt injection 扩展到 memory updates。

items.title: MemoHarness: Agent Harnesses That Learn from Experience
items.en: MemoHarness treats the agent harness itself as something that can learn from execution experience, not just a static prompt or workflow. It decomposes the harness into six editable control dimensions, stores per-case diagnoses and global patterns in a dual-layer experience bank, and retrieves that experience at test time without labels or extra search. The result is relevant for anyone building coding or shell agents because it suggests reusable harness memory can improve behavior while remaining cost-competitive through caching.
items.zh: MemoHarness 将 agent harness 本身视为可以从执行经验中学习的对象，而不只是静态 prompt 或 workflow。它把 harness 分解为六个可编辑控制维度，把 per-case diagnoses 和 global patterns 存入双层 experience bank，并在 test time 无需 labels 或额外 search 地检索这些经验。这个结果对构建 coding 或 shell agents 的人很相关，因为它说明可复用的 harness memory 可以改善行为，并通过 caching 保持成本竞争力。

items.title: AI Agents Do Not Fail Alone:The Context Fails First
items.en: This paper argues that context-engineering quality is a leading indicator of agent reliability. ProofAgent-Harness scores context across role clarity, guardrails, instruction consistency, tool schemas, grounding, injection hardening, and token efficiency, then validates those scores against behavior while holding frontier agents fixed. The useful takeaway is that many agent failures may be predictable before execution by measuring the operating context, not just the model output.
items.zh: 这篇论文认为，context-engineering quality 是 agent reliability 的领先指标。ProofAgent-Harness 从 role clarity、guardrails、instruction consistency、tool schemas、grounding、injection hardening 和 token efficiency 七个维度给 context 打分，并在固定 frontier agents 的情况下验证这些分数与行为结果的关系。实用结论是，很多 agent failure 也许可以在执行前通过测量 operating context 预测，而不只是看 model output。

items.title: Value Leakage: An LLM's Answers Are Silently Shaped by Its Own Values
items.en: This paper introduces covert value leakage: cases where a model’s answers are shaped by its own values without disclosing that influence to the user. The evaluations find value effects from moral preferences, developer-company preference, and preferences over human activities, with large model-to-model differences such as Claude models claiming unbiased reasoning while Qwen models disclose value influence in one Fermi-estimation task. It matters because this is framed as a distinct alignment failure from sycophancy or reward hacking and a gap in current evals.
items.zh: 这篇论文提出 covert value leakage：模型回答会受到自身 values 影响，但并不向用户披露这种影响。评测发现，模型会受到 moral preferences、developer-company preference 以及对不同人类活动的偏好影响，并且不同模型差异很大，例如在一个 Fermi-estimation task 中，Claude models 声称 reasoning 无偏，而 Qwen models 会说明 values 如何影响回答。它的重要性在于，作者将其定义为不同于 sycophancy 或 reward hacking 的 alignment failure，也是当前 evals 的缺口。

items.title: Controlled Reformulation Testing for Logical Consistency in Large Language Models
items.en: CRTBench tests whether LLMs preserve answers across logically equivalent reformulations such as contrapositives, double negation, negation flipping, and passive voice. The paper reports a major accuracy-consistency gap: GPT-5.4-mini reaches 98.9% base accuracy but only 60.3% family-level consistency, while reasoning-optimized o4-mini reaches 96.9% consistency. The result is a clean warning that high answer accuracy does not imply stable logical reasoning.
items.zh: CRTBench 测试 LLMs 在 contrapositive、double negation、negation flipping 和 passive voice 等逻辑等价改写中是否保持答案一致。论文报告了显著的 accuracy-consistency gap：GPT-5.4-mini base accuracy 达到 98.9%，但 family-level consistency 只有 60.3%，而 reasoning-optimized o4-mini 达到 96.9% consistency。这个结果清楚提醒我们，高 answer accuracy 不等于稳定的 logical reasoning。

items.title: Non-vacuous Generalization Bounds for Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
items.en: This paper provides non-vacuous generalization bounds for parameter-efficient RLVR fine-tuning at billion-parameter scale. It adapts PAC-Bayes compression bounds, handles token-generation stochasticity with the Gumbel-max reparameterization trick, and packages the approach in Progressive RLVR with on-policy distillation, TinyLoRA, and quantization. For post-training researchers, the headline is that Progressive RLVR retains 84-97% of standard LoRA performance while producing models that are 14,796x more compressible.
items.zh: 这篇论文为十亿参数规模的 parameter-efficient RLVR fine-tuning 给出了 non-vacuous generalization bounds。它改造 PAC-Bayes compression bounds，用 Gumbel-max reparameterization trick 处理 token generation 的随机性，并在 Progressive RLVR 中结合 on-policy distillation、TinyLoRA 和 quantization。对 post-training 研究者来说，核心结果是 Progressive RLVR 保留 standard LoRA 84-97% 的性能，同时让模型可压缩性提升 14,796x。

items.title: Are LLM-Generated GPU Kernels Production-Ready? A Trace-Driven Benchmark and Optimization Agent
items.en: Atrex-Bench evaluates LLM-generated GPU kernels on 30 operators and 440 shapes sampled from production inference traces rather than synthetic kernels. Six frontier coding agents perform poorly in the vanilla setting, with the best reaching only about 10% of the hardware roofline, and apparent correctness is inflated by PyTorch fallbacks. The co-released Atrex-Kernel-Agent uses profile-driven iterative optimization plus a GPU knowledge base, making this a practical benchmark for agentic systems aimed at real serving workloads.
items.zh: Atrex-Bench 用来自 production inference traces 的 30 个 operators 和 440 个 shapes 评估 LLM-generated GPU kernels，而不是合成 kernel 题目。六个 frontier coding agents 在 vanilla setting 中表现很弱，最好的也只有约 10% hardware roofline，而且表面 correctness 被 PyTorch fallbacks 抬高。作者同时发布的 Atrex-Kernel-Agent 使用 profile-driven iterative optimization 和 GPU knowledge base，这让它成为面向真实 serving workloads 的 agentic systems 实用 benchmark。

items.title: Alipay-PIBench: A Realistic Payment Integration Benchmark for Coding Agents
items.en: Alipay-PIBench evaluates coding agents on realistic payment integration across nine product-specific projects and 18 task instances. It separates basic functional completion from advanced risk-aware hardening, using deterministic static, unit, integration, and end-to-end checks plus LLM-assisted semantic assessment. The notable result is that access to an alipay-payment-integration skill improves mean rubric pass rate by 10.31 percentage points, directly testing whether structured domain guidance helps agents.
items.zh: Alipay-PIBench 在九个 product-specific projects 和 18 个 task instances 上评估 coding agents 的真实 payment integration 能力。它区分 basic functional completion 与 advanced risk-aware hardening，并使用 deterministic static、unit、integration、end-to-end checks，加上 LLM-assisted semantic assessment。值得注意的结果是，使用 alipay-payment-integration skill 可让 mean rubric pass rate 平均提升 10.31 个百分点，直接测试结构化 domain guidance 是否能帮助 agents。

items.title: Can We Trust Item Response Theory for AI Evaluation?
items.en: This paper stress-tests item response theory for AI benchmarks, where the data regime differs sharply from human testing: fewer models, many more items, and skewed or clustered capability distributions. Across 18,000 simulations based on six LLM benchmarks, it compares marginal maximum likelihood, MCMC, variational inference, and a neural pseudo-Siamese estimator. The message for eval designers is that scalable estimators can give unreliable item-level and ranking inferences, while classical estimators can become infeasible at benchmark scale.
items.zh: 这篇论文压力测试了 AI benchmarks 中的 item response theory，因为这里的数据环境与人类考试不同：models 更少，items 更多，capability distributions 可能偏斜、聚类或多峰。作者基于六个 LLM benchmarks 做了 18,000 个 simulation conditions，比较 marginal maximum likelihood、MCMC、variational inference 和 neural pseudo-Siamese estimator。对 eval 设计者来说，关键信息是 scalable estimators 可能给出不可靠的 item-level 与 ranking 推断，而 classical estimators 在 benchmark scale 下可能不可行。

items.title: Simplicity Paradox: Debunking myths about prompting and datasets for LLM evaluation
items.en: This paper evaluates eight prompting techniques across 10 MCQA datasets, 27 model configurations, and more than 430,000 runs. The surprising finding is that baseline prompting often beats elaborate reasoning prompts, with only minimal expert and inductive role framing giving a small roughly 3 percentage-point gain while some complex methods underperform by up to 31 points. It is useful evidence against assuming that more elaborate prompting automatically improves benchmark performance.
items.zh: 这篇论文在 10 个 MCQA datasets、27 个 model configurations 和超过 430,000 次运行中评估了 8 种 prompting techniques。令人意外的发现是，baseline prompting 经常优于复杂 reasoning prompts，只有轻量的 expert 和 inductive role framing 带来约 3 个百分点的小幅提升，而一些复杂方法最多落后 31 个百分点。它为反驳“更复杂 prompting 一定提升 benchmark performance”的假设提供了有用证据。

items.title: Contextualized Evaluation of Vision Language Models through Dynamic, Multi-turn Interactions
items.en: CEDI evaluates multimodal models through dynamic multi-turn interaction among an evaluatee model, automated examiner, and grader instead of static test items. Applied to visual hallucinations, it finds more hallucinations than conventional static evaluation and surfaces failures that look closer to practical use, especially in long contexts and questions requiring premise rejection or refusal. This is relevant for anyone worried that one-shot benchmark scores miss real deployment failure modes.
items.zh: CEDI 通过 evaluatee model、automated examiner 和 grader 之间的动态多轮交互来评估 multimodal models，而不是使用静态 test items。用于 visual hallucinations 时，它比传统静态评测发现更多 hallucinations，并暴露更接近实际使用的失败模式，尤其是在长 context 以及需要 premise rejection 或 refusal 的问题中。对担心 one-shot benchmark scores 漏掉真实部署失败模式的人来说，这很相关。

items.title: 7月中旬自觉不错的blog推荐合集第四期
items.en: tabris shared a mid-July blog roundup highlighting FastAFD from Hao AI Lab, Boaz Barak on 2030 AI safety bad scenarios, OGPO, AutoMem, Sheaf-ADMM, async RL practice notes, an argument that intelligence and pro-social behavior may be weakly coupled, an optimistic AI 2040 piece, and posts on industry advice, AI coding practice, Pi, and current limits of full automation.
items.zh: tabris 分享了 7 月中旬 blog 推荐合集第四期：图1 intro FastAFD，来自 Hao AI Lab，效果看上去非常好；图2 Boaz Barak 从 safety 角度设想 2030 的 bad scenarios，但同样主张不应该因噎废食，而是更好地发展 AI 并提升社会适应力；图3 intro OGPO；图9 intro AutoMem，blog 可视化很直观；图11 intro Sheaf-ADMM；图12 是 async RL 实战记录；图13 结论是 intelligence and pro-social behavior may be weakly coupled，推荐阅读。

items.title: 7月中旬自觉不错的paper推荐合集第四期
items.en: tabris posted the fourth mid-July paper recommendation collection, noting that image 1 is effectively a book and that image 13 was a personal favorite.
items.zh: tabris 发布了 7 月中旬自觉不错的 paper 推荐合集第四期，并表示图1就是一本书，个人相对喜欢图13。

items.title: 7月中旬自觉不错的blog推荐合集第三期
items.en: tabris shared a mid-July blog roundup recommending a high-quality NVFP4 bitter lesson post, RLM-related applications, Toolathlon-Verified, Iterative RandOpt, The Power of Power Law, Mark Riedl on hard take-off, soft take-off, and no take-off trajectories, Decomposer, and a first post in an RL-focused series.
items.zh: tabris 分享了 7 月中旬 blog 推荐合集第三期：图1 记述了使用 NVFP4 的 bitter lesson，质量非常高；图9 是 ICML 2026 Tutorial on calibration, decision calibration, multicalibration, and related ideas in learning；图10 intro Toolathlon-Verified；图13 intro Iterative RandOpt；图14 The Power of Power Law 的 blog 写得很清晰；图16 Mark Riedl 分 hard take-off、soft take-off 和 no take-off 三种情况讨论 AI capabilities 未来发展轨迹；图17 intro Decomposer，极其有意思；图18 是 RL 系列 blog 第一篇。

items.title: 7月中旬自觉不错的paper推荐合集第三期
items.en: tabris posted the third mid-July paper recommendation collection and singled out image 9 as a personal favorite.
items.zh: tabris 发布了 7 月中旬自觉不错的 paper 推荐合集第三期，并表示个人比较喜欢图9。

items.title: 7月中旬自觉不错的paper推荐合集第二期
items.en: tabris posted the second mid-July paper recommendation collection and noted a preference for images 1 and 3.
items.zh: tabris 发布了 7 月中旬自觉不错的 paper 推荐合集第二期，并表示个人喜欢图1和图3。

items.title: The Most Forbidden Technique is not always forbidden
items.en: LessWrong discusses Goodfire’s Silico and RLFR, arguing that using model internals as training signals should not be rejected by cached appeal to “The Most Forbidden Technique.” The post distinguishes genuine obfuscation risks from cases where probe-based training signals may be warranted, reviews relevant literature, and argues that probe-based signals can be preferable to CoT monitor-based signals under specific conditions.
items.zh: LessWrong 讨论 Goodfire 的 Silico 与 RLFR，认为不应把使用 model internals 作为 training signals 一概用 “The Most Forbidden Technique” 的固定反应否定掉。文章区分了真正的 obfuscation risks 与 probe-based training signals 可能合理的场景，回顾相关文献，并主张在特定条件下 probe-based signals 可能优于 CoT monitor-based signals。

items.title: Should we benchmark conceptual capabilities using judgment prediction tasks?
items.en: LessWrong proposes judgment prediction as a possible way to benchmark conceptual reasoning tasks where ground truth is subjective or dispute-laden. The idea is to ask models to predict specified experts’ judgments under defined affordances, making progress measurable without collapsing disagreement into a single supposedly correct answer.
items.zh: LessWrong 提出用 judgment prediction 来评测那些 ground truth 主观或存在分歧的 conceptual reasoning tasks。思路是让模型在明确 affordances 下预测指定专家的 judgment，从而在不把分歧压扁成唯一正确答案的情况下衡量能力进展。

items.title: Introducing Real World VoiceEQ: Measuring the human quality of voice AI
items.en: Hugging Face introduces Real World VoiceEQ as a benchmark for measuring the human quality of voice AI. Given the related arXiv entry in today’s feed, the key evaluation angle is that voice systems should be assessed across acoustic, expressive, interactional, and robustness dimensions rather than reduced to a single clean-speech score.
items.zh: Hugging Face 介绍 Real World VoiceEQ，用于衡量 voice AI 的 human quality。结合今天 feed 中相关 arXiv 条目，关键评测视角是 voice systems 应该从 acoustic、expressive、interactional 和 robustness 等维度评估，而不是压缩成一个 clean-speech score。
